title: [Lymseia's Weaponry]
description: Refined oak-paneled walls rise from a varnished dark oak floor.  Just above a woven Vornavian silk rug hangs a multihued Vornavian silk tapestry, and a dark and light oak ceiling completes the picture.  A Vornavian silk-covered table and an elegant silver jewelry rack stand side by side in the middle of the room.
